title: diaphananthe thomensis
intro: Diaphananthe thomensis, also known as the 'São Tomé's orchid', is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to the island of São Tomé, off the coast of West Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its potential to treat respiratory issues and fever. Diaphananthe thomensis can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions, which may provide relief from coughs and congestion, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
